title: Lucrehulk-class (disambiguation)
content:
{{DISPLAYTITLE:''Lucrehulk''-class}}
[[File:Tfdroidctrlship-NEGVV.png|thumb|200px|A ''Lucrehulk''-class Droid Control Ship.]]
The '''''Lucrehulk''-class''' refers to many types of [[Hoersch-Kessel Drive, Inc./Legends|Hoersch-Kessel Drive, Inc.'s]] starships used by the [[Trade Federation of Planets|Trade Federation]]:

*[[Core ship/Legends|Core ship]]
*[[LH-3010 capital freighter]]
*[[Lucrehulk-class battleship/Legends|''Lucrehulk''-class battleship]]
*[[Lucrehulk-class modular control core|''Lucrehulk''-class modular control core]]
*[[Lucrehulk-class LH-3210 cargo freighter/Legends|''Lucrehulk''-class LH-3210 cargo freighter]]
